overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking along a winding hillside road at night. The scene transitions from a natural rocky terrain with a distant industrial tower to a panoramic view of a neon-lit futuristic city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside approach road with industrial tower view

events.description: futuristic sedan with glowing taillights drives past on the road
passing directly under a bright horizontal LED street light
second vehicle passes by in the opposite lane

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the left shoulder of the winding road toward the illuminated tower on the hilltop

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving downhill with red taillights glowing

entered.detail: tall skeletal metal tower with multiple platforms and antennas silhouetted against the night sky
steep terrain with sparse bushes and small trees
concrete barrier with vertical posts separating the road from the drop-off
tall pole with horizontal LED light bar illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark hillside road at night, walking toward a distant industrial tower. Sparse vegetation covers the rocky slopes on the left while a concrete barrier lines the right edge of the road. Vehicles occasionally pass by, and the camera moves under a bright street light around the 12-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved overlook road revealing downtown skyline

events.description: futuristic pickup truck drives past heading downhill
neon-lit city skyline with holographic billboards becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved road as the urban landscape emerges into view on the right

notable_agents.action: dark pickup truck with illuminated taillights driving along the road

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with pink and blue neon lighting and large digital displays
tall glass buildings with bright window lights and holographic advertisements

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues along the curve, the industrial tower grows larger in the center frame while the rocky hillside moves closer on the left. Around the 35-second mark, the scene dramatically opens up to reveal a sprawling neon city skyline on the right, marking the transition from the natural hillside to the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic city overlook with winding road

events.description: another vehicle passes by heading toward the city
road curves to the left, shifting the city view from right to center

agents.ego_description: walking along the left shoulder as the road curves, with the neon city dominating the view

segments.scene_description: The final segment showcases the full glory of the neon-lit city skyline as the road curves left. The industrial tower disappears behind the camera while the road barrier shifts to the left side of the frame. The camera continues walking along the winding road with the illuminated skyscrapers and holographic displays of Night City providing a stunning backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark hillside road that gradually transforms from a desolate rocky landscape into a panoramic view of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins by moving toward a distant industrial tower, passing sparse vegetation on rocky slopes and a concrete barrier under the intermittent glow of bright street lights. As the camera follows the curve of the road, the industrial tower looms larger in the center frame before the horizon dramatically opens up to reveal a sprawling, illuminated city skyline on the right. The scene then shifts as the road bends left, causing the tower to disappear behind the camera while the road barrier moves to the left side of the frame. Finally, the movement continues along the winding path with the towering skyscrapers and holographic displays of the city providing a vivid, glowing backdrop.
